# Context Tracking Adapter

This instruction has moved to the universal agent system.

Read:

1. `/agent-system/base/CONTEXT-PROTOCOL.md`
2. `/agent-system/base/OBSIDIAN-BRAIN-PROTOCOL.md`
3. `/agent-system/skills/context-tracker/SKILL.md`
4. `/agent-system/skills/obsidian-brain/SKILL.md`

After file changes, update `CONTEXT.md`, create a `.context/` snapshot, create an Obsidian Brain entry, and update the Obsidian `Project Index.md`.
